scripts.dev:campus: npx concurrently -c auto --kill-others-on-fail -n gw,auth,energy,cctv,notify,storage,web "npm run dev --prefix services/api-gateway" "npm run dev --prefix services/auth-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/energy-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/cctv-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/notification-service" "npm run dev --prefix services/storage-service" "npm run dev --prefix apps/campus-web"
